description: Leveraging a combination of design thinking and strategic planning, students will design a clear plan of action with compelling evidence for expected outcomes, implement the proposed plan with contingencies for the inevitable challenges and adjustments, and evaluate impact relative to goals with objective recommendations for future action.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CNSR SCI 657and junior standing, or graduate/professional standing
